revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Expand Chinese]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page--> [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]] to [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Expand Chinese]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page--> [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]] [[Category:qq-Template]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:wikipedia>Numberguy6|wikipedia>Numberguy6]]
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
1 revision imported: re-importing these templates since they seem to have broken
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Numberguy6|en>Numberguy6]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_Chinese here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_Chinese for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Expand language
|langcode=zh
|otherarticle={{{1|}}}
|section={{{section|}}}
|date={{{date|}}}
|fa={{{fa|}}}
|topic={{#switch: {{{topic}}}
 | bio = Biography
 | geo = Geography
 | gov = Government and politics
 | cult = Culture
 | hist = History
 | mil = Military
 | sci | tech | scitech = Science and technology
 | sport = Sports
 | transp = Transport
 | struct = Building and structure
}}
|nodoc={{{nodoc|}}}
|no interwiki={{{no interwiki|}}}
}}
}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
